hypothesis: Equipping the ReAct LLM agent with a simulator tool that returns finite-difference sensitivities of each phase fraction with respect to temperature and oxygen atomic fraction at the current state will increase its success rate on the multi-phase niobium–oxygen targets (challenges 2 and 3) to ≥70% with ≤25 tool calls per attempt, compared to ≤10% without this tool, under the paper’s scoring rubric.
